whatWasRepaired: No structural repair needed. Branded for hail damage only; full mechanical inspection performed.
description: Textbook example of a salvage car that's a genuinely good deal — hail damage is cosmetic, not mechanical.
knownIssues: Cosmetic hail dents on hood and roof — does not affect function, paint is not broken.
whySalvage: A hailstorm caused cosmetic dents across the hood and roof. Insurance payout math on hail claims almost always totals the car even when it still runs perfectly.
